zh.lifeSummary: 當Hamon Belknap於1394年9月4日出生在英國肯特聖 瑪麗 可雷時，他的父親Robert Belknap65歲，母親Sybell Juliana de Dorset54歲。他於1411年與Joan Boteler在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年1月4日在英國素可貝可利享年34歲，埋葬在英國素可韋斯特 迪恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hamon Belknap于1394年9月4日出生在英国肯特聖 瑪麗 可雷时，他的父亲Robert Belknap65岁，母亲Sybell Juliana de Dorset54岁。他于1411年与Joan Boteler在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1429年1月4日在英国素可貝可利享年34岁，埋葬在英国素可韋斯特 迪恩。

nameMeanings.name: Belknap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, the second element of which is most likely Middle English knappe ‘hilltop’. Compare Belnap .
History: Abraham Belknap (c. 1588–c. 1643) emigrated from Latton, Essex, England, to Lynn, MA, in the 1630s.

nameMeanings.name: Hamon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

variants.name: Éamann
meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

meanings: Pronounced ‘ay-mon’ Anglicized spelling of Irish Éamon(n) or Éaman(n), Irish forms of Edmund . Although it still has an essentially Irish flavour, the name was popularized throughout Britain in the 1950s due to the fame of the broadcaster Eamon Andrews ( 1922–87 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hamon Belknap was born on 4 September 1394, in St Mary Cray, Kent, England, his father, Robert Belknap, was 65 and his mother, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, was 54. He married Joan Boteler in 1411, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 January 1429, in Beckley, Sussex, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in West Dean, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hamon Belknap est né le 4 septembre 1394, à St Mary Cray, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Robert Belknap, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Joan Boteler en 1411, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1429, à Beckley, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à West Dean, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England: Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hamon Belknap am 4. September 1394 in St Mary Cray, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Belknap 65 und seine Mutter Sybell Juliana de Dorset 54. Er hat 1411 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Januar 1429 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Beckley, Sussex, England und wurde in West Dean, Sussex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Boteler nel 1411, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 gennaio 1429, nel Beckley, Sussex, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a West Dean, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hamon Belknapが1394年9月4日にイギリスケントスト マリー クレイで生まれた時，父Robert Belknapは65歳，母Sybell Juliana de Dorsetは54歳であった。1411年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでJoan Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年1月4日にイギリススセックスベックリーで34歳で死去し，イギリススセックスウエスト ディーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hamon Belknap(이)가 1394년 9월 4일 영국 켄트 스트 메리 크라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Belknap(은)는 65세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybell Juliana de Dorset(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1411년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Joan Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 1월 4일 영국 수세스 벡리에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 웨스트 디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hamon Belknap nasceu em 4 de setembro de 1394, em St Mary Cray, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Belknap, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Sybell Juliana de Dorset, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Boteler em 1411, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1429, em Beckley, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em West Dean, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hamon Belknap родился 4 сентября 1394 г. в местности ст мэри креи, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Belknap было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybell Juliana de Dorset, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Boteler в 1411 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 января 1429 г. в местности беккли, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности вест дин, суссекс, Англия.
